log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Duergar — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Duergar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Duergar — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Duergar — Bardic Musician.
→ Duergar — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 18 necrotic damage (half).
